transcript: Speaker A: काय करताय? [What are you doing?] Speaker B: आय पोळ्या making. [I am making polya.] Speaker A: पोळ्या making नाही. I am making rotis असं म्हणायचं. [Not "polya making". Say "I am making rotis".] Speaker B: मला English शिकवशील का? [Will you teach me English?] Speaker A: नक्की. रोज माझ्यासोबत फक्त १५ मिनिटं प्रॅक्टिस केली तर तू पटकन English शिकू शकतेस. [Sure. If you practice with me for just 15 minutes daily, you can learn English quickly.] Speaker B: पण माझ्याकडे fees भरण्यासाठी पैसे नाहीत. [But I don't have money to pay fees.] Speaker A: काळजी करू नकोस. तू फक्त १ रुपयाच्या trial पासून सुरुवात करू शकतेस. [Don't worry. You can start with just a 1 rupee trial.] Speaker B: Join कसं व्हायचं? [How to join?] Speaker A: खाली दिलेल्या install button वर click कर. MySivi app install कर आणि तुझी English practice सुरू कर. [Click on the install button below. Install the MySivi app and start your English practice.]
on_screen_text: काय करताय [What are you doing] I पोळ्या making [I making polya] पोळ्या making नाही [Not polya making] I am making rotis मला English शिकवशील का [Will you teach me English?] नक्की रोज माझ्यासोबत [Sure, daily with me] 15 MINUTES तर तू पटकन English [then you quickly English] शिकू शकतेस पण [can learn, but] माझ्याकडे fees [I have fees] भरण्यासाठी पैसे नाहीत [no money to pay] काळजी करू नकोस [don't worry] MySivi Premium: 3 days of Premium benefits for ₹1. Autopay, cancel anytime. 1,200 learners purchased today. 24/7 AI English Teacher, 500+ Exercises and Lessons, Unlimited Access. करू शकतेस Join [can do, Join] कसं व्हायचं खाली [how to do, below] MySivi AI English Spe... Install. Verified by Play Protect. Master Spoken Eng. Sharpen your Englis 1-on-1 calls. Try MyS fast. कर MySivi app [do, MySivi app] तुझी English [your English] practice सुरू कर [start practice]
summary: An AI avatar corrects a rural woman's English while she cooks. The AI promotes the MySivi app, offering a 3-day premium trial for 1 rupee to practice English daily. The CTA urges users to install the app.
